claims.summary: Unicode lambda and hyphenated spectral terms must remain valid continuity anchors.

claims.summary: Silt, moving sediment, calcified permanence, lattice pressure, and quoted metaphors should survive compact extraction.

claims.summary: Higher entropy can justify bounded extra recap room but must not make history unbounded.
claims.disposition: verify soft-gate recap budgets, density moderation, and hard caps
